blocks.content:
In this milestone, you access RCA Workbench to begin investigating incidents in Grafana Cloud.

RCA Workbench provides a centralized interface for investigating incidents by correlating insights across multiple services and infrastructure components. The workbench displays a timeline view where you can see all insights firing across different entities, helping you identify root causes and understand the sequence of events.
You'll navigate to RCA Workbench and populate it with entities to investigate.
Sign in to your Grafana Cloud environment, for example `mystack.grafana.net`.
RCA Workbench opens with an empty workspace.
Click **Show all Services** under **Frequently used** to add all discovered services to the workbench.

RCA Workbench displays with a timeline ready to show insights across your selected entities.

You navigated to RCA Workbench and populated it with entities.
In the next milestone, you'll add specific entities to investigate and set the appropriate time range for your incident.

---

### Troubleshooting

Explore the following troubleshooting topics if you need help:

- [RCA workbench](/docs/grafana-cloud/knowledge-graph/troubleshoot-infra-apps/workbench/)
- [Entity catalog](/docs/grafana-cloud/knowledge-graph/troubleshoot-infra-apps/explore-entity-catalog/)
